spl_product_data_elements: Dove Vitamin E and Kukui Nut Oil Soothing Post-Shave 48h Antiperspirant Deodorant LINALOOL, (+/-)- BENZYL SALICYLATE GLYCERIN CETYL PEG/PPG-10/1 DIMETHICONE (HLB 4) GLYCINE SHEA BUTTER KUKUI NUT OIL 12-HYDROXYSTEARIC ACID ISOMETHYL-.ALPHA.-IONONE ALKYL (C12-15) BENZOATE BENZYL ALCOHOL SUNFLOWER OIL CYCLOMETHICONE 5 CALCIUM CHLORIDE WATER SYNTHETIC WAX (1200 MW) ALUMINUM SESQUICHLOROHYDRATE ALUMINUM SESQUICHLOROHYDRATE LIMONENE, (+)- COUMARIN
description: SHEA MOISTURE RAW VITAMIN E & KUKUI NUT OIL POST-SHAVE 48H ANTIPERSPIRANT DEODORANT - aluminum sesquichlorohydrate stick
active_ingredient: Drug Facts Active ingredient Aluminum Sesquichlorohydrate (12.2)
warnings: Warnings • For external use only. • Do not use on broken skin . • Ask a doctor before use if you have kidney disease. • Stop use if rash or irritation occurs.
keep_out_of_reach_of_children: • Keep out of reach of children. If swallowed, get medical help or contact a Poison Control Center right away.
inactive_ingredient: Inactive ingredients Water (Aqua), Synthetic Wax, Cyclopentasiloxane, Glycerin, C12-15 Alkyl Benzoate, Niacinamide, Calcium Chloride, Fragrance (Parfum), Cetyl PEG/PPG-10/1 Dimethicone, Glycine, Helianthus Annuus (Sunflower) Seed Oil, Butyrospermum Parkii (Shea) Butter, Aleurites Moluccanus Seed Oil, Hydroxystearic Acid, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Benzyl Alcohol, Benzyl Salicylate. Coumarin, Limonene, Linalool
package_label_principal_display_panel: Packaging Shea Moisture Soothing AP Deo
